channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: SAP Integrates n8n to Scale Agentic AI for Enterprises
item.description: SAP has invested in and formed a partnership with artificial intelligence orchestration platform n8n to help enterprises scale agentic AI. The strategic investment that n8n secured from SAP that values n8n at $5.2 billion, which is more than double the previo… [Intel, SAP]
